headings.usage: Bold, futuristic, tracking-tight, fluid sizing. Never use Inter/Roboto.

styles.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

body.usage: Clean, highly legible body text with generous line-height.

typography.instructions_to_main_agent: Import these fonts via Google Fonts: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600&family=Outfit:wght@400;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

colors.usage: Use true black (#050505) and deep obsidian (#0A0A0A) for backgrounds. Use Laser Magenta (#FF007F) as the sole vibrant accent for CTAs, highlights, and micro-interactions. Avoid AI slop gradients. Ensure high contrast (WCAG AA).

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF007F] text-white font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#E60073] transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,0,127,0.4)] hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300
buttons.floating_cta: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 rounded-full p-4 bg-[#FF007F] text-white shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,0,127,0.5)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer

cards.base: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-300
cards.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 transition-all py-4

marquee.style: bg-[#FF007F] text-white py-2 overflow-hidden flex whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase

grids.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8

layouts.hero: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center items-center relative overflow-hidden text-center px-4 md:px-8
layouts.section: py-24 md:py-32 px-6 md:px-12 max-w-7xl mx-auto
layouts.spacing: Use generous spacing (gap-8, py-24). Avoid cramped designs. Elements should breathe.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1, scale-105 for images, border color shifts.
motion.entrance: Fade up with framer-motion (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1).
motion.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for smooth, continuous scrolling of announcements.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards. Use #F8F9FA for primary text on dark backgrounds.
accessibility.aria: Include aria-labels for all icon buttons, especially the floating WhatsApp CTA.
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-whatsapp-btn').

logo.description: Monochrome white DC wordmark on transparent/dark background

hero_bg.description: Sleek interior of a high-tech store (darken with bg-black/60 overlay)

experience.description: People shopping, looking at a phone

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion for micro-interactions and smooth reveals. 3D canvas (R3F) is not strictly required unless explicitly modeling a device. A 2.5D parallax effect via framer-motion is preferred for performance.

seo.meta_tags: Include dynamic title, meta description, OpenGraph tags.
seo.schema: Implement LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema for both store locations (Gaur City & Grand Venice Mall).

location_1.name: Gaur City Mall
location_1.address: GF 29, Ground Floor, Samsung Store, Gaur City Mall, Greater Noida West

location_2.name: Grand Venice Mall
location_2.address: LGF 57, Lower Ground Floor, Samsung Store, Grand Venice Mall, Greater Noida

instructions_for_main_agent: Build a hybrid full-stack application (marketing + light dashboard) using React and Tailwind CSS.
Ensure contact is ONLY via Instagram (@digi.connect_) and WhatsApp. Do not build an email contact form.
Create an admin dashboard (login-protected mock is fine) to manage featured products, offers, and the rotating announcement marquee.
Design the Hero section with a heavy text focus (Outfit font), bold magenta accents, and a darkened background image.
Include a floating WhatsApp CTA that opens a popover to let users choose between 'Gaur City' and 'Grand Venice'.
Bento grid layout for 'Why Choose DigiConnect'.
Never center text globally. Left-align dense content.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
